descriptionShort: BCJHL game recap: Vernon Lakers defeat Richmond Sockeyes 7-6 Thursday night, with league history and alumni notes.
descriptionLong: Vernon Lakers defeated Coast Division-leading Richmond Sockeyes 7-6 in a BCJHL game Thursday night, with Doug Spooner scoring four goals. The article includes coverage of other league games and historical notes on BCJHL alumni in the NHL and college hockey, mentioning players like Ray Ferraro and Dean Evason, plus current coaches including Mike O'Brien of Richmond.
